---
id: reorder-nntp-providers
title: "Reorder NNTP providers"
description: "Reorders the list of NNTP providers to set priority (first provider is highest priority)"

hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true

<Heading
  as={"h1"}

  children={"Reorder NNTP providers"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"put"}
  path={"/api/providers/reorder"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Reorders the list of NNTP providers to set priority (first provider is highest priority)
